items.title: Meta’s own research found parental supervision doesn’t really help curb teens’ compulsive social media use
items.description: An internal research study at Meta found that parental supervision may not help teens regulate their social media, and teens with trauma are more incl...

items.title: Apple is reportedly cooking up a trio of AI wearables
items.description: As the AI hardware space heats up, the iPhone maker has multiple smart products in development.

items.title: Thrive raises $10B for new fund, its largest yet
items.description: Thrive Capital just raised $10 billion for its new fund-- nearly double the size of its last fund.

items.title: Climactic launches hybrid fund to get startups through the ‘valley of death’
items.description: The new project, called Material Scale, will initially focus on climate tech startups in the apparel industry.

items.title: Anthropic releases Sonnet 4.6
items.description: Anthropic has released a new version of its mid-size Sonnet model, keeping pace with the company's four-month update cycle.
